content: Hi, I'm Quinn, a geologist from Denver. I've just returned from a sabbatical traveling through South America, and I'm still trying to process everything I saw and experienced.
Wow, that sounds like an amazing adventure. What were some of the highlights of your trip?

There were so many incredible experiences, but one of the standout moments was visiting the Galapagos Islands. The wildlife and scenery were just breathtaking. And I've also been getting into origami lately, which is a great way for me to relax and be creative.
The Galapagos Islands are a unique and special place. And origami is such a precise and delicate art form. Do you have a favorite thing to make with origami?

I love making cranes and other birds. There's something so satisfying about folding the paper and watching the shape emerge. I've also been doing some archery, which is a great way for me to challenge myself and improve my focus.
Archery is a great way to improve your focus and discipline. Do you have a favorite place to practice archery?

Yeah, I love practicing at the archery range near my house. The scenery is beautiful, and it's always quiet and peaceful. I've also been brewing my own beer at home, which is a fun hobby that I've gotten into recently.
Home brewing can be so much fun. Do you have a favorite type of beer that you like to brew?

I love brewing IPAs and other hoppy beers. There's something about the combination of flavors and aromas that I just can't get enough of. And I've also been trying my hand at stand-up comedy, which is a great way for me to challenge myself and be creative.
Stand-up comedy is a brave and challenging pursuit. Do you have any upcoming shows or performances planned?
Actually, I'm planning to perform at a comedy club in Boulder next month, which I'm really looking forward to. I've been working on my material and trying to hone my stage presence.
That sounds like a great opportunity. I'm sure you'll do great. Do you have any other hobbies or interests that you enjoy in your free time?
Yeah, I love listening to podcasts and trying to learn new things. I'm always looking for new shows and topics to explore, and I love how podcasts can be both entertaining and educational.
